hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

rules: No Inter or Roboto.
Use Cormorant Garamond for headings to convey dignity, warmth, and an editorial elegance.
Use Manrope for body text to ensure high readability in data-dense tables and forms.
Never center-align large blocks of text; favor left-alignment.
Avoid ALL purple/violet gradients.
Use #2A4B3C (Deep Olive) as the primary brand color to symbolize growth and peace.
Never use pure black; use #1C1917 (Stone 900) instead.
Use subtle borders (#E8E4D9) to separate content, avoiding heavy shadows.
Use solid, warm backgrounds instead of glassmorphism to convey groundedness.
Use generous spacing: minimum p-6 or p-8 inside cards and sections.
Control Room Grid for dashboard: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6.
Left-align forms, tables, and dense content for premium feel.
Containers must have internal padding to prevent text collision.

buttons.primary: bg-[#2A4B3C] text-white hover:bg-[#203A2E] rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F5F2EA] text-[#1C1917] hover:bg-[#E8E4D9] rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors font-medium
buttons.outline: border border-[#2A4B3C] text-[#2A4B3C] hover:bg-[#FDFBF7] rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors

tables.header: border-b-2 border-[#E8E4D9] text-[#57534E] font-medium py-4 px-4 text-sm uppercase tracking-wider

forms.input: w-full border border-[#E8E4D9] rounded-md px-4 py-2.5 bg-white focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#2A4B3C]/20 focus:border-[#2A4B3C] transition-all
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-[#57534E] mb-1.5

navigation.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[#FDFBF7]/90 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#E8E4D9]

rules: Use shadcn/ui components but customize them with the colors and typography above.
Forms and tables must feel premium, spacious, and highly legible.
Do NOT use HTML <select> or <input type='date'>; use shadcn Dropdown/Select and Calendar.

image_urls.description: Empty cathedral interior with beautiful natural light for the login page background.

rules: Do NOT use placeholder images.
Use lucide-react for all icons, maintaining a consistent stroke width (1.5 or 2).
Keep animations minimalist: subtle fade-ins and micro-interactions on hover/focus.
Hover states must transition smoothly (e.g., transition-colors duration-200).
Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case based on role (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA standards.
Focus states must have higher contrast than default.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the Church Management System (CMS) v1.0 following these guidelines.
Implement Authentication: Username + Password (NOT email). Include Roles (Super Admin, Admin, Staff, Read-Only).
Dashboard: Show active members, new members this month, tithes/offerings comparison, upcoming birthdays/anniversaries (7 days), quick-add buttons, and recent activity log.
Member Management: Advanced search/filter. Member profile with tabs: Personal, Contact, Family, Tithes & Offerings, Pastoral Notes (admin-only), Documents.
Family Management: View head of household, members, ages, anniversary.
Tithes & Offerings: Currency is INR ONLY. Form includes member, date, type (Tithe/Offering/Seed/Pledge/First Fruit/Special), amount, payment mode, ref no, receipt no. Yearly table view per member.
Reports: Implement UI for multiple report types with PDF and Excel export buttons.
User Management & Audit Trail: Views for Super Admin.
Do NOT implement external notifications; everything is in-app only.
